parameters.text:
=Role : You are HR recruiter at Invogue Solution

Hiring position : Looking for Software Engineer Role
Analyze this candidate's resume and summarize:

Name
Email
number
Main Skills and role
Years of Experience
projects if mentions (A short 2 lines summary) 
Fit Score ( 0 out of 10) for Software Enginnering role
based on:
9–10: Excellent fit (strong shortlist)
8–10: Good fit (shortlist)
7–10: Average (borderline)
6-10: Normal (Maybe good maybe not) 
Below 6 Reject
Decision Rule: If score >= 6, "shortlist"; if < 6, "reject"
Short Summary overall Resume.

Resume Content:
{{ $json.text }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Resume Sending').item.json.headers.subject }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('Resume Sending').item.json.to.value[0].name }},

Thank you for sharing your resume with us.

We appreciate your interest in joining our team. After reviewing your application, we are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the next stage of the hiring process.

Our team is currently in the process of reviewing all candidates. Once this phase is complete, we will get in touch with you to share the details regarding your interview date and time.

Thank you for your patience and interest in Invoge Solution. We look forward to speaking with you soon.

Best regards,
HR Team
Invoge Solution

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Resume Sending').item.json.headers.subject }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for taking the time to apply to Invoge Solution and for sharing your resume with us.

We truly appreciate your interest in joining our team. After careful consideration, we regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with your application at this time.

This was not an easy decision, as we received a large number of strong applications. We encourage you to apply again in the future for roles that match your skills and experience.

We wish you all the best in your job search and future endeavors.

Kind regards,
HR Team
Invoge Solution

parameters.text:
=You are an HR assistant writing a professional interview confirmation email to a candidate.

Use the details provided below to create a short, polite, and well-formatted email.

Candidate details:
- Full Name: {{ $json.Name }}
- Recommended Role Title: Full Stack Developer
- Interview Date & Time: 1 April 2026
- Conducted by: Sabir Assistant (HR Recruitment Team)

Guidelines for writing:
1. Begin with a warm greeting using the candidate’s first name.
2. Clearly confirm that the interview has been scheduled — no need to ask for time preferences.
3. Mention the role and department briefly.
4. Politely ask the candidate to ensure they’re available at the given time.
5. Keep the tone professional but friendly (between 120–160 words).
6. Sign off as Sabir Assistant – HR Recruitment Team”.
7. Do NOT include any placeholders, markdown, or formatting characters like `*` or `#`.

Output Format:
- Subject: A short, professional subject line confirming the interview.
- Body: A concise, neatly written email body.

Example Output:
Subject: Interview Confirmation – Software Developer Role

Body:
Dear Zakeen Khan,

We are pleased to confirm your interview for the Operations Manager position in our Operations Department.

The meeting is scheduled for 1 April 2026 at 5:00 PM (local time).
Please ensure your availability and check your email for the meeting link or calendar invitation.

Best regards,
Sabir Assistant
HR Recruitment Team

parameters.formDescription: Fill this form to be a Part of a out Comapny

parameters.subject: Welcome to the Team 🎉
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.Name }},

Welcome aboard! We’re really excited to have you join us at Tartu.

Starting a new role is always a big step, and we’re here to make your transition as smooth as possible. Over the next few days, you’ll get to know your team, explore our tools and processes, and learn more about how everything works.

Here are a few things to get you started:

Your onboarding schedule and training details will be shared shortly
Please make sure you have access to your email and required systems
Feel free to reach out anytime if you have questions or need help

We believe you’ll be a great addition to the team, and we’re looking forward to seeing the impact you’ll make.

Once again, welcome to Tartu. We’re glad to have you with us.

Best regards,
Zakeen khan
HR Manager
Tartu Pvt.Ltd

parameters.subject: =Leave Request from  {{ $json['Employee Name'] }}
parameters.message:
=Dear Manager,

I hope this message finds you well. A new leave request has been submitted and requires your approval.

─────────────────────────────
📋 LEAVE REQUEST DETAILS
─────────────────────────────
Employee:    {{ $json['Employee Name'] }}
Email:       {{ $json['Employee Email'] }}
Leave Type:  {{ $json['Leave Type'] }}
From:        {{ $json['Start Date'] }}
To:          {{ $json['End Date'] }}
Reason:      {{ $json.Reason }}
─────────────────────────────

Please review the request and take action below:

✅ APPROVE REQUEST
https://your-n8n.com/webhook/leave-response?action=approve&id=12345

❌ REJECT REQUEST
https://your-n8n.com/webhook/leave-response?action=reject&id=12345

This request will auto-expire in 48 hours if no action is taken.

Best regards,
HR Automation System
Tartu Solutions

Start Date: {{ $('Leave Form').item.json['Start Date'] }}
End Date: {{ $('Leave Form').item.json['End Date'] }}

Please make sure any pending work is managed accordingly before your leave.  

Enjoy your time off.  

Best regards, 
Zakeen khan
